update_policy.local_checkout: Preferred when a sibling scrnaseq checkout is present; record commit and branch. Dirty checkouts are rejected by default and require explicit --allow-dirty-pipeline opt-in. --require-local-pipeline fails instead of falling back to the remote pipeline.
update_policy.remote_repo: Allowed only with an explicit pinned version or tag; never use latest.

validation_required_before_update: Run the wrapper unit test suite.
Run preflight against a representative samplesheet.
Run the upstream demo profile when Nextflow and the selected backend are available.
Verify MultiQC, pipeline_info, h5ad detection, provenance, and reproducibility outputs.
breaking_change_review: Review supported presets and aligner names.
Review output path conventions for h5ad, rds, MultiQC, and pipeline_info.
Verify upstream nextflow.config save_align_intermeds default has not changed (currently true in 4.1.0).

execution_policy.work_dir_policy: A user-supplied --work-dir may be a local path or an object-store URI for cloud executors and is recorded in provenance/replayed by commands.sh.
execution_policy.cellranger_conda: Cell Ranger presets are rejected with conda/mamba by default; --allow-conda-cellranger is required for trusted site configs.
execution_policy.extra_nextflow_configs: Only validated -c/--config files are allowed; they are copied into reproducibility/nextflow_configs and replayed by commands.sh. Config contents are trusted Groovy code and are not sandboxed.
